title: Season World
body:
![Season World](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de48c4828a18d848eb04c8d88f975e634050f761.gif)
###  **What is Season World ?**

Season World is a meticulously curated modpack designed to provide a diverse and immersive gaming experience. Each mod included in this pack has been selected to enhance various aspects of the game, from space exploration to expansive landscapes, improved travel systems, and practical survival tools. In addition to the mods, we have integrated resource packs and shaders to visually enhance your world.

---------------------------------------
᲼
###  **📦 Main Mods**


- **🚀 Ad Astra** 
> Embark on interstellar journeys and explore new planets and moons. Prepare yourself for an out-of-this-world space adventure.
  
- **⛰️ Terralith** 
> Discover completely reimagined biomes with spectacular and varied terrains, offering new opportunities for exploration and construction.
  
- **🎒 Traveler's Backpack** 
> Never run out of space for your items with this versatile backpack that accompanies you on all your adventures.
  
- **🗺️ Waystone**
> Easily teleport between different points in your world using waystones, simplifying your travels.
  
- **🎤 Voice Chat** 
> Communicate in real-time with your friends and other players directly in the game using this integrated voice chat system.

- **🕺 Animation Overhaul** 
> Enjoy enhanced character and mob animations for increased immersion and realism.

᲼

###  **🎨 Resource Packs and Shaders**

- **🎭 Fresh animation** 
> Make your game look like the trailers! Dynamic animated entities to refresh your Minecraft experience.

- **🧩 Faithful 32x** 
> The original Minecraft texture, with twice the resolution and double the fun!


- **💎 BSL Shaders** 
> It's bright, colorful, and distinct.

- **👓 Complementary Shaders** 
> Preserve the elements of Minecraft with exceptional quality, detail, and performance.

---------------------------------------

᲼

### **📝 Credits**

**Mods :**

- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - Emissive, Random & Custom texture support for entities in resourcepacks
- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) - OptiFine format, Custom Entity Model replacement mod available for Fabric
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - Render the player skin layer in 3d
- [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) - Live long and prosper, Ad Astra
- [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) - #listentonature
- [Animation Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/animationoverhaul) - Smooth and interactive animations. Customizable and compatible
- [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm) - Abstraction Layer™ for Blay's multiplatform mods
- [Blur+](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-fabric) - Adds a blur effect to all GUI backgrounds - now for Fabric
- [Bookshelf](https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-lib) - An open source library for other mods
- [Botarium](https://modrinth.com/mod/botarium) - A crossplatform API for devs
- [Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api) - A data attachment API
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) - See who you're chatting with
- [Chat Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatanimation) - Makes chat messages appear with a smooth animation.
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - A Fabric mod that allows for efficient connected textures
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) - Adds a search bar to the Key-Bindings menu
- [CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore) - A core mod
- [Dark Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen) - Makes the loading screen darker.
- [Durability Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/durability-tooltip) - Durability Tooltip shows you the durability of an item!
- [Easy Anvils](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-anvils) - Be ready for overhauled anvils! Items stay, better name tags, many tweaks!
- [Easy Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic) - Enchanting tables as they always should have been!
- [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) - A mod that adds sprite animations for edible and drinkable items.
- [Effect Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/effect-descriptions) - Find out what potion effects do without checking the wiki.
- [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions) - Provides a way to get enchantment descriptions from enchanted books.
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Lightweight and modular API
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - Kotlin programming language for Fabric mods.
- [FancyMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu) - Customize Minecraft's menus with ease!
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimizations
- [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) - Forge's config systems provided to other modding ecosystems.
- [Hang Glider](https://modrinth.com/mod/hang-glider) - Soar through the skies and explore the world's beauty with your brand-new hang glider!
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo
- [Inventory Sorting](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-sorting) - Quick, simple, and lightweight inventory sorting
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - A modern shaders mod for Minecraft
- [Jade 🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) - Shows information about what you are looking at. (Hwyla/Waila fork for Minecraft 1.16+)
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) - JEI - View Items and Recipes
- [Konkrete](https://modrinth.com/mod/konkrete) - Just another boring library mod.
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod
- [Melody](https://modrinth.com/mod/melody) - [https://modrinth.com/mod/melody](https://modrinth.com/mod/melody)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) - Enhances inventory management by adding various functions to the mouse buttons. 
- [Necronomicon API](https://modrinth.com/mod/necronomicon) - A personal utility library for my mods.
- [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium) - Optimises worldgen performance for a better gameplay experience.
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - Bringing first-person animations to the third-person
- [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) - Fast nvidia only rendering engine for sodium
- [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) - Accessible, Data-Driven, Dependency-Free Documentation
- [Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib) - Why's it called Puzzles you ask? That's the puzzle!
- [Resourceful Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-config) - Resourceful Config is a mod that allows for developers
- [Resourceful Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-lib) - Resourceful Lib
- [Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables) - Searchables is a library mod
- [Server Country Flags](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-country-flags) - Adds a flag to servers in the server list which tells where the server is located.
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - View the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) - A working voice chat in Minecraft!
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - A modern rendering engine for Minecraft which greatly improves performance
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - A Sodium addon that adds features that shouldn't be in Sodium.
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) - Mod that provides realistic sound attenuation, reverberation through blocks.
- [SuperMartijn642's Config Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/supermartijn642s-config-lib) - Config Lib makes dealing with config files just a bit easier.
- [spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark) - spark is a performance profiler for Minecraft
- [Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars) - Adds customizable bars to the status effects
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) - Explore almost 100 new biomes
- [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) - Massively altered world generation 
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api) - Placeholder and Text manipulation library for your Minecraft mods.
- [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) - Unique and upgradeable backpacks with customisation.
- [Visual Workbench](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-workbench) - Items stay inside of crafting tables and are also rendered on top. It's really fancy!
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) - Teleport back to activated waystones. For Survival, Adventure or Servers.
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - Displays a map of the nearby world 
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft.
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - A zoom mod with infinite customizability.

**Resource Packs :**

- [Fresh Animations & Patch + Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) - Make your game like the trailers! 
- [Faithful 32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x) - The original Minecraft texture feel, with double the resolution and double the fun!
- [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode) - 🌙 The Dark Mode Resource Pack for Minecraft: Java Edition
- [Season World](https://github.com/QuentinBAUDRY/CustomTexturePack) - Pack custom for Season World

**Shaders :**

- [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) - Shaderpack for Minecraft: Java Edition. It's bright, colorful
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) - Exceptional quality, detail, and performance.
